annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under 735 ILCS 5/2-1303(c) — 6% / 5% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Illinois’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
